creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note: BUILD_ALL_PYTHON_FLAVORS is poorly named, opposite to the implementation we needed (packaging infrastructure specific design), and not necessary to switch/change Python versions in poudriere. 

DEFAULT_VERSIONS=python=x.y should be all that's necessary.

If that doesn't work, something is wrong with lang/python310 or framework support/code for that version that we should isolate.
